subcodes.first_line: O thou who art alive with the remembrance of God! True life in this world is the mention of the Divine, and in that world, nearness to the mercy of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زنده بذکر حق حیات حقیقی در این جهان ذکر یزدان و در آن جهان جوار رحمت رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @attaining the life of the spirit, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
